title: D_ Optimized Pack
description: A balanced and confortable modpack, just like gray.
body:
With the purpose of being balanced between optimization, useful functions and beautiful visuals, this modpack seeks to bring the player greater comfort when playing. Having a little bit of everything.

**Includes mods such as:**

_3D Skin layers_

_FPS boost mods_

_Reso'Packs to make it extra cooler_

_Too Many Animations (because it makes every move better)_

_Borderless Fullscreen mod_

_and MUCH more!!!_
